tool_input.description: Read knowledge sections for correlation validation
Read knowledge sections for correlation validation
Run read-sections.sh with specified knowledge file sections
Run read-sections.sh with specified knowledge file sections

tool_input.command:
KNOWLEDGE_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge"

for pair in \
  "component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json:s11" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json:s16" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-InjectForm.json:s3" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-nablarch-validation.json:s14" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json:s6" \
  "component/handlers/handlers-InjectForm.json:s4" \
  "component/libraries/libraries-nablarch-validation.json:s21"; do
  file="${pair%%:*}"
  section="${pair##*:}"
  echo "=== $file : $section ==="
  jq -r --arg sec "$section" '
    (if . == null then error("FILE_NOT_FOUND") else . end) |
    . as $root |
    ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s |
    if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND"
    else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content
    end
  ' "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/$file" 2>/dev/null || echo "FILE_NOT_FOUND"
  echo "=== END ==="
done
tool_input.description: Read sections from knowledge JSON files using jq

tool_input.command:
KNOWLEDGE_DIR="/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge"
FILE1="component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json"

echo "=== $FILE1 : s6 ==="
jq -r --arg sec "s6" '. as $root | ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/$FILE1" 2>/dev/null || echo "FILE_NOT_FOUND"

echo "=== $FILE2 : s4 ==="
jq -r --arg sec "s4" '. as $root | ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/$FILE2" 2>/dev/null || echo "FILE_NOT_FOUND"
echo "=== END ==="

echo "=== $FILE3 : s21 ==="
jq -r --arg sec "s21" '. as $root | ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/$FILE3" 2>/dev/null || echo "FILE_NOT_FOUND"
